info.description: A single recurring session entry (Returning Circle and similar). Add one per location/time. Use the Sessions repeater on a Community Event page to list multiple.

day_of_week.description: When this session runs. Example: 'Wednesdays' or 'Sundays at 11am'.

time.description: Time window. Example: '7.30pm to 8.45pm UK'. Leave blank if not fixed.

location_label.description: Where this session is held. Example: 'In person on the houseboat (Taggs Island)' or 'Live on Zoom'.

location_url.description: Optional link for the location — e.g. Google Maps for the houseboat, or the Zoom join page. Leave blank for plain text.

notes.description: Any extra detail about this session. One short paragraph at most.

style.description: Optional background colour, text colour, padding, alignment, max width, and background image for this section. Leave any field blank to use defaults.
